query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status, oi.productId, oi.quantity, p.name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id WHERE o.id = 2;
